config.splits_note: AF redistributed across train/val/test (train: 202,203; val: 201,219,222,213; test: 210,221,200)
config.loader_state: post-bugfix: window_seconds correctly propagated to segment_record

training.training_curve_note: Train F1 climbed 0.32 -> 0.72 over 13 epochs (model is learning the training distribution). Val F1 peaked at 0.39 then plateaued. Train-val loss gap widened from epoch 6 onward (~0.32 train vs ~2.2 val) — classic overfitting to subject-specific AF morphology in train records 202 and 203.

verdict: Model successfully overfits training AF morphology (train F1 0.72) but fails to generalize to test-set AF records — collapses to majority-class prediction on test. AURC of 0.888 confirms uncertainty ranking is also uninformative: notably, mean entropy on AF test samples (0.36) is LOWER than on NSR (0.51), meaning the model is *confidently* wrong on AF. This is the most diagnostic of the three runs and the cleanest motivation for the rPPG path: 3-record AF test from 32 train records is below the cohort-size threshold needed to learn cross-subject AF morphology.
